query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_teachers, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_teachers,
       SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_teachers
FROM teachers;
